probes.name: attribution-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: attributions, attribution_touchpoints, plus their indexes (composite on (tenant_id, subject_type, subject_id) for lookup, composite on (tenant_id, attribution_id, captured_at) for touchpoint scan, composite on (tenant_id, campaign, captured_at) for rollup).

probes.name: attribution-subject-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the partial unique index (tenant_id, subject_type, subject_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL exists on attributions. Missing this index makes AttributionResolver.findOrCreate O(N) per lookup — request-boundary latency blows up.

probes.name: attribution-touchpoint-scan-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite index (tenant_id, attribution_id, captured_at DESC) exists on attribution_touchpoints. Feeds the my-attribution timeline widget + the touchpoint-count reconciler.

probes.name: attribution-campaign-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite index (tenant_id, campaign, captured_at) exists on attribution_touchpoints. Feeds CampaignRollupAggregatorJob — missing index blows up rollup latency into minutes on large tenants.

probes.name: attribution-touchpoint-write-lag
probes.description: Measures p99 latency of AttributionTouchpointObserver.creating (the append-only write). Should stay < 20ms — this fires on every attribution-bearing HTTP request.

probes.name: attribution-count-drift-clean
probes.description: Reads stackra.attribution.count_drift_corrections counter. Any non-zero value in the last 24h is a data-integrity signal.

probes.name: attribution-rollup-recent
probes.description: Confirms CampaignRollupAggregatorJob completed within the last 2 hours (hourly cadence + 1h slop). Stale rollup indicates scheduler drift.

probes.name: attribution-reconciler-recent
probes.description: Confirms ReconcileAttributionCountsJob + PurgeArchivedAttributionsJob completed within the last 8 days (weekly cadence + 24h slop).

probes.name: attribution-churn-detector-recent
probes.description: Confirms MarkAttributionChurnedJob completed within the last 25h (daily cadence + 1h slop). Stale detector means churn cohorts stop appearing on dashboards.

probes.name: attribution-consent-suppression-rate
probes.description: Reads stackra.attribution.consent_suppressions_total counter over the last 1h. Sudden spikes (e.g. 100x baseline) indicate a consent-gate misconfiguration or a compliance-driven bulk revocation. Not itself a bug — but a signal for compliance to investigate.

probes.name: attribution-ip-hasher-clean
probes.description: Confirms the IpHasher salt is set in Doppler + the SHA-256 output length is 64 chars. A misconfigured salt would produce colliding hashes across tenants — critical privacy risk.

probes.name: attribution-click-id-catalog-loaded
probes.description: Confirms data/click-id-catalog.json parsed successfully at boot. Every declared provider (google / meta / tiktok / microsoft / snapchat) must have a valid cookie + query_param mapping.
